transcript: Speaker A: Neevu ibru... nin idhi family Kannada medium, English alli enu barutte anta... bari hadine dina aagide. And because of this AI teacher, my English has improved so much. [You both... your entire family is Kannada medium, how can you learn English... it's only been 15 days. And because of this AI teacher, my English has improved so much.] Speaker B: Wait... ondu AI teacher nimgge English maatadod kaltitiya? [Wait... an AI teacher teaches you to speak English?] Speaker C: And only 15 days? Idyaade hosa app... [And only 15 days? Which new app is this?] Speaker A: Hawdu, ondu app ide, SpeakX anta. Atralli ondu AI teacher ide. Adu nimage English maatadod helkodutte. Adu simple ritiyalli. Niv time waste maadtidri alla, aa timalli naanu 15-20 minutes ee app alli dina English maatadod practice maadtidde. Idaralli AI teacher irodarinda maatadoke mujgaranu agalla. Matte thappa aadre takshana sari maadutte. Banni, nodi ee app. [Yes, there is an app called SpeakX. It has an AI teacher. It teaches you to speak English in a simple way. While you guys were wasting time, I used to practice speaking English on this app for 15-20 minutes daily. Since there is an AI teacher, there is no embarrassment in speaking. And if you make a mistake, it corrects you instantly. Come, look at this app.] Speaker B: Hello ma'am, neevu namgu English maatadokke hoytira? [Hello ma'am, will you teach us to speak English too?] Speaker D (AI Avatar): Yes, neevu nimma free time alli nanna jothe English maatadodu practice madoke start maadi, Sheetal tara nimma English kooda 15 inda 20 dinagalalli fluent aagutte. [Yes, start practicing speaking English with me in your free time, and just like Sheetal, your English will also become fluent in 15 to 20 days.] Speaker B: Wow yaar, ee AI teacher super ide. Nandgu nintara English kalibeku. [Wow, this AI teacher is super. I also want to learn English like you.] Speaker A: Ee app nanna life eh change maadbidtu. Ivaga nange ella kade mariyade sikkide gottha? Neeribbaru igale nimma phone tagori. SpeakX app download maadi. [This app changed my life. Now I get respect everywhere, you know? Both of you take out your phones right now. Download the SpeakX app.]

[Wait...], ondu AI teacher [an AI teacher], maatadod kaltitiya? [teaches to speak?], And only 15 days? [And only 15 days?], Idyaade hosa app... [Which new app is this...], ondu app ide [there is an app], SpeakX [SpeakX], English maatadod [speaking English], simple ritiyalli [in a simple way], niv time waste [you waste time], maadtidri allaa [were doing, right], 15-20 minutes [15-20 minutes], English maatadod [speaking English], Idaralli AI teacher [In this, AI teacher], mujgaranu agalla [no embarrassment], Matte thappa aadre [And if it's wrong], takshana sari maadutte [corrects instantly], Hello ma'am, [Hello ma'am,], neevu namgu [you to us too], English [English], maatadokke hoytira? [will you teach to speak?], neevu nimma free [you in your free], English maatadodu [speaking English], start maadi, [start,], sheetal tara [like Sheetal], nimma English kooda [your English too], 15 inda 20 dinagalalli [in 15 to 20 days], fluent aagutte [will become fluent], wow yaar, [wow friend,], ee AI teacher [this AI teacher], Nandu nintara [I also like you], English kalibeku [want to learn English], Ee app ninda [From this app], change maadibidtu [changed], mariyade sikkide [got respect], Neeribbaru [Both of you], phone tagori [take phone], download maadi [download], Download SpeakX App, PREMIUM, Learn with Personal AI Mentor, Unlock Unlimited Exercises, Learn with 100+ speaking exercises, 100+ Real Life Scenarios, Practice through daily life scenarios, Get Personalised Feedback, Improve your speaking with instant feedback, OFFER ENDS IN 00:09:20, Start 7 Days Trial Now
summary: A young woman explains to two friends how she improved her English speaking skills in just 15 days using the SpeakX app's AI teacher. She demonstrates the app's interactive features, showing how it provides instant corrections without judgment. The ad ends with a call to action to download the app and start a 7-day free trial.
